# GitHub Milestones

These are the GitHub milestone definitions for the NanoProof Protocol project. Each file maps 1:1 to a GitHub Milestone (create via the GitHub UI or `gh api`).

| File                              | Milestone                          | Due (target) |
| --------------------------------- | ---------------------------------- | ------------ |
| `mvp-scaffolding.md`              | MVP Scaffolding                    | shipped      |
| `phase-2-creator-registry.md`     | Phase 2 — Creator Registry         | shipped (impl) |
| `phase-3-citation-engine.md`      | Phase 3 — Citation Engine (thin slice shipped) | +4 weeks |
| `phase-4-payment-engine.md`       | Phase 4 — Payment Engine           | +7 weeks     |
| `phase-5-research-agent.md`       | Phase 5 — AI Research Agent        | +10 weeks    |
| `lepton-demo-mvp.md`              | Lepton Demo MVP                    | 2026-07-05   |

Open issues link to milestones by `milestone: phase-N-<slug>` in their YAML frontmatter.
